_doc: Pre-built ad creative copy for Meta + Google. One block per LP. Each block: 5 headline variants × 5 primary-text variants × 3 CTA-button labels × WhatsApp prefill messages × URL with full UTM. Use the variants verbatim or as a starting point — don't rewrite from scratch.
